title: QuickLog-Solo Category Export/Backup Schema
description: Schema for a single line in category export or backup NDJSON files used in QuickLog-Solo.

kind.description: Identifier for the category data kind.

name.description: Display name of the category. Must not be a system reserved name.

color.description: The theme color identifier for the category.

tags.description: List of tags associated with the category.

animation.description: The animation ID to play when this category is active.

order.description: The display order of the category.

kind.description: Identifier for the category data kind.

type.description: Indicates this item is a page break (used in clipboard export).

name.description: Internal name for the page break (used in backup files).

order.description: The display order of the page break.
